content.question: What is the long-term equity distribution effect of tracking-based stratification versus the documented short-term achievement gains for selected students, and does this vary by socioeconomic background or locality type?
content.reduction_path: Undertake longitudinal cohort analysis following students from track assignment through post-secondary education and labor-market outcomes, disaggregated by initial socioeconomic status and settlement type, to measure persistence of gaps across generations
